name: sem10_topic_method_grouping_holdout
description: Locked holdout for Batch 14 SEM-10 topic/method grouping.

papers.title: Sterile-neutrino projections at muon colliders
papers.abstract: Heavy neutral lepton searches are revisited for future colliders.
papers.methodology: Detector emulation and profile templates are used.

papers.title: Analytic amplitudes for exotic hadron poles
papers.abstract: Exotic hadron spectroscopy is constrained by unitarity and dispersion.
papers.methodology: A dispersive amplitude analysis is performed.

papers.title: Line-shape constraints on tetraquark states
papers.abstract: The exotic hadron spectrum is revisited.
papers.methodology: Bootstrap-assisted amplitude fits are combined with dispersion relations.

papers.title: Global SMEFT fits to flavor anomalies
papers.abstract: Rare B-decay anomalies are interpreted in an operator language.
papers.methodology: A global effective theory fit is used.

papers.title: Lattice form factors for rare semileptonic decays
papers.abstract: Hadronic form factors are computed nonperturbatively.
papers.methodology: A lattice Monte Carlo calculation is presented.

papers.title: Lattice-assisted effective-theory constraints
papers.abstract: Rare-decay form factors feed into operator analyses.
papers.methodology: Lattice inputs are matched onto an effective theory fit.
